parameters.query: SELECT id FROM rag.collections WHERE name = $1 ;
SELECT count(*) as total FROM rag.vectors WHERE metadata->>'source_url' = $1;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": ($node["Validar BDD"].json.total || 0) > 0, "total_vectores": ($node["Validar BDD"].json.total || 0), "source_url": $('Subir a Drive').item.json.webViewLink, "script_output": ($node["Ingesta File"].json.stdout || $node["Ingesta File"].json.stderr || "Sin salida") } }}
